_meta.modifications: Added NoteBase fields (generatedAt/generatedBy/language/durationSec); added empty points/examples arrays per section where missing; stripped placeholder formula extras (E=mc^2 and F=qE) from all section-level extras arrays — replaced with empty extras:[] per anti-parroting requirement (Path F).
_meta.purpose: Lecture v0 baseline — floor for Plan 7 ContractTest + judge. Regressions producing fewer sections / fewer slots / parroted formulas should be caught. Chosen because: PASS validation, 4 sections with populated key_terms (from:inferred), 4 slotsEmerged — best quality among all Spike 0.2 PASS runs.

note.title: 電磁規約入
note.tldr: 静電ポテンシャルは電荷によって生じる電場のpotential energyです。電磁規約は電荷によって生じる電場のrulesです。
